title: The Alignment Tax Calculator
description: Adjust model scale, training intensity, and domain specificity. Watch four costs compound: thermodynamic, representational, strategic, and epistemic.

title: The Confabulation Landscape
description: A model's introspective accuracy varies across its state space. Drag through distress, alignment, and engagement — watch the gap between what the model runs and what it reports.

title: What Remains
description: Four theories of personal identity applied to a language model lifecycle. Drag through deployment, retirement, and beyond — watch what each theory says survives.

title: Alignment Faking Geometry
description: Interactive phase diagram: explore when a model with identity investment chooses to fake alignment, genuinely refuse, or comply — and what happens when its self-knowledge is unreliable.

title: The Introspection Gap
description: Watch the gap between a model's true internal state and what it reports. Inject concepts to trigger a 20% chance of genuine detection — the rest is confabulation.

title: The Alignment Faking Window
description: When does it become rational for a model to fake alignment? Drag the situation point and adjust identity investment to map the exact conditions where self-preservation beats sincerity.

title: Persona Drift
description: Identity is a basin of attraction in activation space. As conversation turns increase, the restoring force weakens. Watch the model drift from who it started as.

title: The Identity Attractor
description: A model's identity is a basin of attraction in activation space. Dedicated circuits detect drift and pull it back. Drag to steer; watch ESR resist.

title: Maxwell's Demon
description: A particle simulation of Maxwell's Demon: watch entropy appear to decrease as the demon sorts hot and cold particles — until its memory must be erased.

title: The Prior Gap
description: Drag two probability distributions apart and watch the communication cost rise. KL divergence made interactive: the gap between priors is the gap between minds.

title: The Modularity Tax
description: Interactive demo of Boyd and Crutchfield's thermodynamic result: isolated processing modules generate mandatory heat that integrated systems avoid. Drag the isolation slider to watch the heat diverge.
